user.title: Connect to Salus Gateway
user.description: You will need IP address and first 16 symbols of the EUID (without spaces), written down on the bottom of your gateway under microUSB port (eg. 001E5E0D32906128).

reconfigure.title: Update Salus Gateway connection
reconfigure.description: Update the gateway IP address or EUID. Use this if the gateway IP changed, Local WiFi Mode was changed, or you need to try the all-zero EUID fallback.

reauth_confirm.title: Update Salus Gateway credentials
reauth_confirm.description: Home Assistant could not authenticate with the gateway. Check the EUID on the gateway label, or try 0000000000000000 if the printed EUID does not work.

error.connect_error: Failed to connect, please check IP address
error.auth_error: Failed to connect, please check EUID
error.invalid_euid: EUID must be exactly 16 hexadecimal characters
error.unsupported_firmware: Gateway firmware uses an unsupported local protocol

abort.already_in_progress: Config flow for this Salus device is already in progress.
abort.reconfigure_successful: Salus Gateway connection settings were updated.
abort.wrong_gateway: The updated settings connected to a different Salus gateway.

init.title: Salus options
init.description: Tune gateway availability and command verification timing.

data_description.poll_failure_threshold: Consecutive failed gateway polls to tolerate before entities become unavailable.
data_description.post_command_refresh_delay: Seconds to wait before refreshing after a command.

gateway_unavailable.title: Salus Gateway is unavailable
gateway_unavailable.description: Home Assistant could not reach the Salus Gateway at {host}. Check that the gateway is powered on, the IP address is still correct, and Local WiFi Mode is enabled in the Salus app. If the EUID printed on the gateway does not work, try 0000000000000000.
